variants: Boris Zahariev is an innovator known for his creation of the Feather Circuit Array. Originally from Heronrift Village, he currently lives in Franconia Hollow, where he continues to explore new ideas. His inventive spirit has led him to receive the Snowplume Ribbon in recognition of his accomplishments. Respected in his community, Boris is also a passionate member of the Jetstream Orators Guild, where he shares his love for oratory and technological advancement.

In Franconia Hollow, Boris Zahariev has made a name for himself as the creator of the Feather Circuit Array. Boris actively participates in the Jetstream Orators Guild, engaging with fellow members who share his enthusiasm for eloquence and innovation. His work has significantly impacted the field of technology.
